heading: Director of the Government Publishing Office: night work
label: 307 Director of the Government Publishing Office: night work
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall cause the public printing in the Government Publishing Office to be done at night as well as through the day, when the exigencies of the public service require it.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 42 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 4728 Stat. 607
Amendments2014—, substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 113–235, § 1301(c)
